basics.name: Tai D. Vu
basics.label: Senior Data Scientist
basics.summary: A Vietnamese man who has a deep affection for nature, a fascination with technology, and an insatiable curiosity.

work.name: MobiFone, Vietnam
work.summary: My role involves guiding and empowering the team to meet and exceed key performance indicators, ensuring data quality, and implementing effective strategies for data analysis. Together, we work to drive informed decision-making, improve processes, and deliver impactful results through data-driven solutions, all while fostering a culture of collaboration and innovation within the team
highlights: Develop and implement machine learning algorithms used to suggest data packages for users
Work with large-scale data sets, utilizing distributed computing platforms such as Apache Spark
Utilize deep learning framework Pytorch for internal projects
Optimize sending daily SMS to the candidate user list by redesigning process flow and operating on distributed systems
Maintain and manage on-premise and cloud servers
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and solve complex problems in a fast-paced environment

work.name: VinCSS (Subsidiary of Vingroup), Vietnam
work.summary: My responsibilities include leveraging cutting-edge data analysis techniques and machine learning to identify threats, vulnerabilities, and patterns within the ever-evolving landscape of online security. I work closely with cross-functional teams to develop predictive models, detect anomalies, and strengthen the company's defense mechanisms
highlights: Designed and developed database system from zero
Developed services for collecting information in many sources such as internal data, social networks, news, forums, etc.
Collaborated with Blue and Red team to analyze and identify the security threats of customer

work.name: Zalo, Vietnam
work.summary: Worked on data-product team responsible for providing business reports, analyzing generated data to make valuable insights
highlights: Built data pipelines for monitoring and evaluating the efficiency of Zalo features
Utilized deep learning framework of Theano for image classification
Conducted advanced analysis using models in machine learning

awards.title: MobiFone Innovation Award
awards.summary: Propose and establish a process for enhancing customer care personalization

awards.title: Outstanding Employee Award
awards.summary: Revamp inefficient operating processes, and surpass KPI targets

certificates: Google Cloud Platform Big Data and Machine Learning
